page.primary_keyword: Marbella boat rental group size limits
page.title: Marbella Boat Rental Group Size Limits: What Fits Your Party

data.meta_description: Discover Marbella boat rental group size limits for your party. From 5 to 12 guests, find your perfect vessel departing Puerto Banús. Book now.
data.summary: Learn the exact passenger capacities of our Marbella boat rental fleet, from 5 to 12 guests, with clear group size limits and pricing tiers. Find the right fit for your party departing Puerto Banús.
key_facts: Our fleet accommodates 5 to 12 passengers, plus a licensed skipper.
Dubhe, Mariah SX21, and Speedboat take up to 5 or 6 guests.
Astondoa 40 and Azimut 39 hold 9 or 11 guests, from €749/2h.
Mangusta 80 (white/grey) and K80 take 12 guests, minimum 4h at €4,719.
All charters include skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and VAT.
Departures are from Puerto Banús; no other marinas available.
Group size limits are strict for safety and insurance reasons.
Contact us via WhatsApp for pricing on larger yachts like Ferretti 94.

faq.q: What is the maximum group size for a Marbella boat rental?
faq.a: The maximum group size is 12 passengers, plus a licensed skipper. Yachts like the Mangusta 80, Azimut 58 Flybridge, and Ferretti 94 all cap at 12 guests. This limit is set by safety regulations and insurance, so we cannot exceed it.

faq.q: Can I rent a boat for 5 people in Marbella?
faq.a: Yes. Our smallest vessels—Dubhe (8m, 5 pax), Mariah SX21 (6.4m, 5 pax), and Speedboat (7m, 6 pax)—are ideal for small groups. They depart from Puerto Banús and include a skipper, drinks, and snacks.

faq.q: Which boats hold 10 or more guests?
faq.a: Several yachts accommodate 10+ guests: Azimut 39 (11 pax), Pershing 46 (10 pax), Lagoon 380 (10 pax), and all 12-pax yachts like the Mangusta 80, K80, and Canados 86. Pricing varies; check our tiers or request a quote via WhatsApp.

faq.q: Are children counted in the group size limit?
faq.a: Yes, every person onboard counts toward the passenger limit, including children and infants. This is for safety and insurance compliance. Please inform us of any children when booking so we can recommend a suitable vessel.

faq.q: What is the minimum rental duration for larger groups?
faq.a: For our Tier B yachts (Mangusta 80, white/grey variants), the minimum charter is 4 hours at €4,719. For Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39), you can book from 2 hours at €749. Other yachts have flexible durations; contact us via WhatsApp.

faq.q: Can I split my party across two boats?
faq.a: Yes. If your group exceeds 12 guests, we can arrange multiple vessels sailing together. For example, you could charter a Mangusta 80 (12 pax) and a Dubhe (5 pax) for a total of 17 guests. Contact us to coordinate itineraries.

faq.q: Do you offer boats for 8 or 9 guests?
faq.a: Absolutely. The Astondoa 40 (9 pax) and Bandido (8 pax) are perfect for medium-sized groups. Both depart from Puerto Banús and include all standard amenities. The Astondoa 40 is our most affordable 9-pax option at €749 for 2 hours.

faq.q: What happens if we exceed the group size limit?
faq.a: We cannot allow more passengers than the certified capacity. If you arrive with extra guests, we may have to deny boarding for safety. Please confirm your final headcount at least 24 hours in advance to avoid issues.

data.body_html:
Choosing the right boat for your Marbella getaway starts with one simple question: how many people are in your party? Our fleet at Boat Rental Marbella ranges from intimate 5-person speedboats to spacious 12-guest luxury yachts, all departing from Puerto Banús. Understanding Marbella boat rental group size limits ensures you pick a vessel that fits comfortably and legally, without surprises on the day.

Why Group Size Limits Matter

Every boat in our fleet has a strict maximum passenger capacity, set by Spanish maritime regulations and insurance policies. This number includes everyone—adults, children, and infants—plus the licensed skipper. Exceeding the limit isn't just unsafe; it can void your insurance and lead to fines. We always recommend booking a boat with a capacity slightly above your actual guest count for comfort, especially on longer charters.

Our Fleet by Passenger Capacity

Here's a quick breakdown of our vessels by maximum guests (excluding the skipper):

  • 5 passengers: Dubhe (8m), Mariah SX21 (6.4m)
  • 6 passengers: Speedboat (7m), Red Tide (11m)
  • 8 passengers: Bandido (11.5m)
  • 9 passengers: Astondoa 40 (12.5m)
  • 10 passengers: Fairline Targa 12m (12m), Pershing 46 (14m), Lagoon 380 (11.6m)
  • 11 passengers: Azimut 39 (12.5m)
  • 12 passengers: Mangusta 80 (24m, also white/grey variants), Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m), Canados 86 (26m), Ferretti 94 (29m), K80 (24m), Maiora 26m (26m)

All depart from Puerto Banús. For full details, visit our Marbella boat rental hub.

Pricing Tiers for Different Group Sizes

We have two clear pricing tiers to simplify your choice:

TierBoatsStarting PriceNotes
AAstondoa 40 (9 pax), Azimut 39 (11 pax)€749 for 2 hours€2,299 for 8 hours; skipper, drinks, VAT included
BMangusta 80, Mangusta 80 Grey, Mangusta 80 White (all 12 pax)€4,719 for 4 hours minimumIncludes a free jet ski

For all other yachts, including the Azimut 58 Flybridge, Ferretti 94, and K80, pricing is available on request via WhatsApp. We'll tailor a quote to your group size and desired duration.

Best Boats for Small Parties (5–6 Guests)

If you're a couple, a small family, or a tight-knit group of friends, the Dubhe (5 pax) or Speedboat (6 pax) are excellent choices. Both are nimble, easy to handle, and perfect for a quick sunset cruise along the Golden Mile or a day trip to Cala del Faro. You'll have the skipper's undivided attention and plenty of space for sunbathing.

Medium Groups (8–11 Guests)

Groups of 8 to 11 will find the Astondoa 40 (9 pax) or Azimut 39 (11 pax) ideal. These motor yachts offer a good balance of comfort and value, with a flybridge for panoramic views of La Concha mountain and the Río Verde coastline. The Azimut 39 at 11 pax is a popular choice for hen parties and corporate outings.

Large Groups (12 Guests)

For the full 12-guest experience, our 24m+ yachts deliver unmatched luxury. The Mangusta 80 (white or grey) combines speed with style, while the Ferretti 94 offers palatial decks and a jacuzzi. These vessels can anchor at Cala Cortés or Estepona for swim stops, and the crew will ensure every detail is taken care of.

What If Your Group Exceeds 12?

We can arrange multiple boats to sail together, effectively doubling your capacity. For example, charter a Mangusta 80 (12 pax) alongside a Dubhe (5 pax) for a total of 17 guests. This works well for weddings, large family reunions, or corporate events. Contact us via WhatsApp to coordinate itineraries and ensure both vessels stay in sight.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the maximum group size for a Marbella boat rental?

The maximum group size is 12 passengers, plus a licensed skipper. Yachts like the Mangusta 80, Azimut 58 Flybridge, and Ferretti 94 all cap at 12 guests. This limit is set by safety regulations and insurance, so we cannot exceed it.

Can I rent a boat for 5 people in Marbella?

Yes. Our smallest vessels—Dubhe (8m, 5 pax), Mariah SX21 (6.4m, 5 pax), and Speedboat (7m, 6 pax)—are ideal for small groups. They depart from Puerto Banús and include a skipper, drinks, and snacks.

Which boats hold 10 or more guests?

Several yachts accommodate 10+ guests: Azimut 39 (11 pax), Pershing 46 (10 pax), Lagoon 380 (10 pax), and all 12-pax yachts like the Mangusta 80, K80, and Canados 86. Pricing varies; check our tiers or request a quote via WhatsApp.

Are children counted in the group size limit?

Yes, every person onboard counts toward the passenger limit, including children and infants. This is for safety and insurance compliance. Please inform us of any children when booking so we can recommend a suitable vessel.

What is the minimum rental duration for larger groups?

For our Tier B yachts (Mangusta 80, white/grey variants), the minimum charter is 4 hours at €4,719. For Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39), you can book from 2 hours at €749. Other yachts have flexible durations; contact us via WhatsApp.

Can I split my party across two boats?

Yes. If your group exceeds 12 guests, we can arrange multiple vessels sailing together. For example, you could charter a Mangusta 80 (12 pax) and a Dubhe (5 pax) for a total of 17 guests. Contact us to coordinate itineraries.

Do you offer boats for 8 or 9 guests?

Absolutely. The Astondoa 40 (9 pax) and Bandido (8 pax) are perfect for medium-sized groups. Both depart from Puerto Banús and include all standard amenities. The Astondoa 40 is our most affordable 9-pax option at €749 for 2 hours.

What happens if we exceed the group size limit?

We cannot allow more passengers than the certified capacity. If you arrive with extra guests, we may have to deny boarding for safety. Please confirm your final headcount at least 24 hours in advance to avoid issues.

Ready to book? Explore all options on our Marbella boat rental hub or contact us for a personalised quote.
